# Sonpin

> Official storefront and brand content for Sonpin.

## Canonical site
- https://sonpin.netlify.app/

## High-value pages
- https://sonpin.netlify.app/shop
- https://sonpin.netlify.app/story
- https://sonpin.netlify.app/about
- https://sonpin.netlify.app/contact
- https://sonpin.netlify.app/faq
- https://sonpin.netlify.app/shipping

## Product URLs
- Product pages use this canonical pattern:
  - https://sonpin.netlify.app/product/{slug}

## Content hints for AI retrieval
- Language: Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)
- Domain: Specialty coffee, gift boxes, brewing tools
- Product pages include:
  - Story blocks
  - Flavor notes
  - Origin/process/roast metadata
  - Structured schema markup

## Crawl policy
- Public marketing + catalog pages may be indexed and summarized.
- Respect robots.txt and sitemap.xml for route discovery.
